name: Secureframe
tagline: Fast compliance automation for SOC 2, ISO 27001 and more
description: Secureframe automates security compliance for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, PCI DSS, and other frameworks. Known for its fast time-to-audit (often under 2 weeks), extensive integrations, and AI-powered remediation guidance.
use_cases: You're a startup that needs to pass a SOC 2 Type II audit in weeks, not months, to close enterprise deals
Your infra is spread across AWS, GCP, and Okta and you need 200+ integrations to automate evidence collection
You want AI-powered remediation guidance that tells you exactly what to fix when a control fails
You need a built-in pen testing marketplace to satisfy auditor requirements without managing separate vendor relationships
